1815500.name: Schizophrenia
1815500.description:
Story:

I am in a bunker unknown to me. There was an accident in the bunker and I need to get out of it as quickly as possible, otherwise I will go crazy. The food in it can run out at any moment. Strange sounds are also heard.

Features:


  • The character begins to go crazy and hallucinations appear
  • You have different dreams
  • High level of difficulty
  • One life if you die, the game will start from the very beginning
  • Variability in the passage

Gameplay:


  • If your character starts going crazy, it will affect the gameplay.
  • You will have to look for objects in order to somehow survive and get out of the bunker. You need to carefully examine all the places so as not to miss useful things.
  • You will have dreams. In these dreams you can find useful information and memories.
  • To avoid being in complete darkness without electricity, you will have to refuel the generator from time to time.
1815500.supported_languages:
英语*, 俄语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
